query:
UPDATE scan_results
            SET status = 'completed', findings_count = $2,
                critical_count = $3, high_count = $4, medium_count = $5,
                low_count = $6, info_count = $7, completed_at = NOW(),
                scanner_version = COALESCE($8, scanner_version),
                started_at = $9,
                scan_completeness = $10
            WHERE id = $1
